definitions.text: om stoff: blande seg med et annet stoff, særlig en væske, slik at blandingen blir ensartet
definitions.translation: of a substance: to mix with another substance, especially a liquid, so that the mixture becomes uniform
examples: sukker løser seg i varmt vann

definitions.text: om konflikt, problem eller lignende: bli fjernet eller gå i orden
definitions.translation: of a conflict, problem: to be removed or resolved
